transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said she'd send a referral to a dermatologist, but I haven't heard anything and it's been two weeks.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry for the wait. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your record?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Linda Torres, born April 3rd, 1980.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Linda. I see a referral from Dr. Patel to Westfield Dermatology submitted on the 5th, but it looks like it's still pending authorization.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh no, is there something wrong with it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Not wrong, just stuck in the queue. I can escalate it now so it's approved today, and I'll also give you the clinic's direct line so you can schedule once it clears.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would be great, thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I've submitted the escalation. Westfield Dermatology's number is 555-284-6190. You should be able to call them by tomorrow morning.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Linda. Is there anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks so much.
